## Meeting Purpose

[Screening call to assess George Chasiotis's strategic growth capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Pivot:** George Chasiotis is seeking a new challenge after winding down his second agency. He previously scaled his first agency, Minuttia, to 19–20 people.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [**Targeted SEO:** At SwagDrop, George's team used listicles to target high-value B2B leads (e.g., 1,200-employee rebrands), successfully competing with larger brands like Swag.com.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [**AEO & Brand:** AEO success requires a strong brand, not just SEO tactics. At MailSearch, a robust GitHub repo provided the LLM context that enabled new content to rank in hours.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [**Content Audit Method:** George developed an "opportunity score" system, weighting business data (leads, revenue) with organic data (keywords, sessions) to prioritize content updates.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)

## Topics

### Background & Motivation

  - [George Chasiotis scaled his first agency, Minuttia, to 19–20 people before losing interest.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [A second agency, co-founded this year, is winding down by year-end.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Motivation:** Seeking a new challenge; GrowthX is his first priority.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)

### Case Study: SwagDrop (SEO for B2B Leads)

  - [**Context:** A promotional products client was struggling during COVID.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [**Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
      - [**Initial:** Build topical authority with listicles, which dominated SERPs at the time.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
      - [**Refinement:** Pivot from broad traffic to high-value B2B leads by targeting specific use cases (e.g., "rebranding for 1,200 employees").](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - **Outcome:** SEO became the \#1 lead source, beating competitors like Swag.com. The team also suggested the rebrand to "SwagDrop.com."
  - [**Learned Lesson:** An HR glossary diluted the site's focus. **Insight:** Target audiences with specific content (e.g., "Bamboo HR alternatives") and retarget, rather than creating broad, dilutive resources.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)

### Case Study: MailSearch (AEO & Brand)

  - [**Context:** A technical SaaS client with a strong GitHub repo.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [**Observation:** New content ranked on Google and in LLMs within hours.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** AEO success requires a strong brand, not just SEO tactics.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
      - [**Brand Strength:** A robust GitHub repo provided LLMs with deep product context.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
      - [**Reputation:** High G2 review counts correlate with better LLM performance.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [**Recommendation:** For brands lacking this foundation, run campaigns to build online reputation (e.g., G2 reviews) to accelerate AEO results.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)

### Strategic Frameworks

  - [**Short- vs. Long-Term Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
      - [**Existing Content:** Start with content updates, then identify and fill gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
      - [**New Site:** Prioritize high-intent pages (alternatives, comparisons, category lists).](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [**Content Audit & Prioritization:**](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
      - [**Method:** An "opportunity score" system to prioritize content updates.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
      - [**Process:** Weight business data (leads, revenue) with organic data (keywords, sessions) to identify high-value pages for refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
      - [**Gap:** Current tools (ClearScope, Profound) lack business data integration.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
  - [**Identifying & Fixing Strategic Misalignments:**](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
      - [**Problem:** At Toggle (time tracker), new content failed to perform despite a strong brand.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
      - [**Root Cause:** A large volume of underperforming content (content debt) from 5–10 years was dragging down overall site performance.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
      - [**Solution:** A major content audit, pruning, and consolidation effort was required before new content could succeed.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kyle Gaudreau:** Schedule a follow-up call between George Chasiotis and Andy to discuss operational details.](https://fathom.video/share/KKy-YAvzqaNYujLryCiuUDp_1D7G1DKT?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
